moments.title: Wimbledon Begins
moments.blurb: The world's most prestigious tennis tournament, Wimbledon, kicks off for two weeks of grass-court action in London.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries, cream, and world-class tennis! Wimbledon 2026 serves up its first aces tomorrow. Who's your pick for the trophy?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: The All England Club gates open tomorrow! Can a British star go all the way at Wimbledon this year? We're ready for two weeks of drama.

angles.name: Morning Serve
angles.copy: Wimbledon season is officially here! Tune in from Monday for all the action from SW19. Who's your favourite to lift the trophy?

moments.title: Austrian Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Austrian Grand Prix is happening today, with the race set to determine who takes the top step on the podium.

angles.name: Race Day
angles.copy: It's race day at the Austrian Grand Prix! Who are you backing for the win today? Get ready for some high-speed drama in Spielberg.

angles.name: Sunday Thrills
angles.copy: Engines revving for the Austrian Grand Prix! Sunday afternoon is all about F1. Will there be any surprises on the Red Bull Ring?

moments.title: Kellie Pickler Turns 40
moments.blurb: American country music singer and former American Idol contestant Kellie Pickler celebrates her 40th birthday today.

angles.name: Country Star
angles.copy: Happy 40th Birthday to the incredible Kellie Pickler! From American Idol to country music stardom, what's your favourite Kellie track?

angles.name: Idol to Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Kellie Pickler's 40th today! The talented singer first captured hearts on American Idol. Send her some birthday love!

moments.title: Mark Stoermer Turns 49
moments.blurb: Mark Stoermer, bassist for the iconic rock band The Killers, celebrates his 49th birthday today.

angles.name: Killers Bassist
angles.copy: Happy 49th Birthday to Mark Stoermer, the brilliant bassist from The Killers! What's your favourite Killers song that gets you moving?

angles.name: 00s Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 49th Birthday to Mark Stoermer of The Killers! The band's hits defined the 00s for many of us. What's your go-to track?

moments.title: Saul Davies Turns 61
moments.blurb: Saul Davies, guitarist and violinist for the legendary British band James, celebrates his 61st birthday today.

angles.name: James' Maestro
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to Saul Davies from James! His guitar and violin work are iconic. What's your top James anthem?

angles.name: 90s Alternative
angles.copy: Celebrating Saul Davies of James, turning 61 today! From 'Sit Down' to 'Laid', their music defined a generation. What's your favourite James memory?

moments.title: Ian Paice Turns 78
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the only constant member and legendary drummer of Deep Purple, celebrates his 78th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the one and only Ian Paice of Deep Purple turns 78! The man behind some of rock's most iconic drum fills. What's your favourite Deep Purple track?

angles.name: 70s Pioneer
angles.copy: Get ready to wish Ian Paice a very Happy 78th Birthday tomorrow! A true 70s rock pioneer with Deep Purple. Which song showcases his drumming best?

moments.title: Colin Hay Turns 73
moments.blurb: Colin Hay, the distinctive voice of Men at Work and a successful solo artist, celebrates his 73rd birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Men at Work Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Colin Hay of Men at Work turns 73! His voice is instantly recognisable. What's your favourite track from the 80s legends?

angles.name: Classic Voice
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday for tomorrow to Colin Hay! Whether with Men at Work or solo, his songs are timeless. Which one's on your playlist?

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger Turns 48
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, known for The Pussycat Dolls, celebrates her 48th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the fabulous Nicole Scherzinger turns 48! From Pussycat Doll to solo star, she's a true performer. What's your favourite Nicole track?

angles.name: 00s Diva
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 48th Birthday for tomorrow to Nicole Scherzinger! The voice behind so many 00s anthems. Which one takes you back?

moments.title: DJ Shadow Turns 54
moments.blurb: Influential American DJ and record producer DJ Shadow, a pioneer of instrumental hip-hop, celebrates his 54th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Electronic Genius
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday for tomorrow to the groundbreaking DJ Shadow! A true innovator in electronic music. What's your favourite track from him?

angles.name: Hip-Hop Pioneer
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate DJ Shadow's 54th birthday! His influence on instrumental hip-hop is massive. Which album is a must-listen?

moments.title: Lytham Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Lytham Festival, one of the UK's biggest live music events, begins on Wednesday in Lytham St Annes, Lancashire, featuring a huge lineup of artists.

angles.name: Festival Fever
angles.copy: Lytham Festival 2026 is almost here! Kicking off on Wednesday, who are you most excited to see on the Lancashire coast?

angles.name: Midweek Music
angles.copy: Wednesday marks the start of Lytham Festival! Five days of incredible music in Lytham St Annes. Who's got their tickets ready?

moments.title: British Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix weekend starts on Friday at Silverstone Circuit, bringing high-octane racing to the UK.

angles.name: Silverstone Calling
angles.copy: The roar of F1 returns to Silverstone this Friday for the British Grand Prix! Who's your money on for pole position and the race win?

angles.name: Home Race
angles.copy: It's almost time for the British Grand Prix! The F1 circus rolls into Silverstone on Friday for a weekend of speed. Are you trackside or watching from home?

moments.title: Love Supreme Festival
moments.blurb: The Love Supreme Jazz Festival, the UK's largest outdoor jazz festival, kicks off its weekend of music, food, and culture in Glynde Place, East Sussex.

angles.name: Jazz & Soul Vibes
angles.copy: Love Supreme Festival starts this Friday! Get ready for a weekend of the best jazz, soul, and funk in East Sussex. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Groove
angles.copy: Friday marks the start of Love Supreme! Three days of incredible music and good vibes. Who's heading to Glynde Place?

moments.title: Tour de France Grand Départ
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France begins on Saturday with the Grand Départ in Barcelona, Spain.

angles.name: Cycling Epic
angles.copy: The greatest race on two wheels begins this Saturday! The Tour de France 2026 kicks off in Barcelona. Who's your favourite for the Yellow Jersey?

angles.name: Grand Départ
angles.copy: Get ready for three weeks of gruelling climbs and sprint finishes! The Tour de France starts on Saturday. Where will you be watching from?

moments.title: Post Malone Turns 30
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated rapper, singer, and songwriter Post Malone celebrates his 30th birthday on Saturday.

angles.name: Genre-Bending Star
angles.copy: Happy 30th Birthday for Saturday to the one and only Post Malone! From 'Rockstar' to 'Circles', his hits are undeniable. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Birthday Bash
angles.copy: Saturday is Post Malone's 30th birthday! Get ready to celebrate with his genre-defying tracks. Which one gets you on the dance floor?

moments.title: Huey Lewis Turns 76
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, known for their 80s hits, celebrates his 76th birthday on Sunday.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Happy 76th Birthday for Sunday to the legendary Huey Lewis! 'The Power of Love' and 'Hip to Be Square' still sound amazing. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Timeless Hits
angles.copy: Sunday marks Huey Lewis's 76th birthday! The voice behind so many classic tracks. Which Huey Lewis and the News song is always on your playlist?

moments.title: UK School Summer Holidays Start
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are beginning across parts of the UK this week, marking the start of the long break for many students.

angles.name: Summer Break Begins
angles.copy: School's out for summer! For many across the UK, the summer holidays begin this week. What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Kids Are Out
angles.copy: The school summer holidays are kicking off! Get ready for six weeks of fun. What's the first thing you're doing with the extra time?

angles.name: Local Summer Fun
angles.copy: Devon schools are starting to break up for summer! What local adventures are you planning with the kids during the long holiday?
